Owner: Kavan Gondalia
Updated: 2026-05-25

Purpose
- Personal portfolio for Kavan Gondalia, a backend-focused full-stack developer.
- Highlights about, skills, career history, projects, achievements, and contact links.

High-level summary
- Tagline: "Trying everything & finding happiness"
- Focus: backend-focused full-stack work, problem solving, scalable systems.

About
- Explorer mindset; enjoys learning, experimenting, and building.
- Interests include problem decomposition and elegant solutions.
- Personal note: enjoys jogging with music to recharge.

Skills
Languages
- TypeScript, JavaScript, C++, Go, Python, GraphQL, Dart, Java

Frameworks and Libraries
- Node.js, Express.js, FastAPI, Flutter, React.js, Next.js

Tools and Technologies
- Git, MongoDB, PostgreSQL, Docker, Redis, MySQL, AWS, Nginx

Career
- Snaptrude: SDE-1 (Jul 2025 - Present)
  - Built a single-prompt agent harness with FastAPI and LLMs; analyzed bottlenecks and tool-selection conflicts to justify modular multi-agents.
  - Engineered a data lookup agent for multi-step execution over 15+ schemas; integrated external cloud storage tools as live knowledge sources.
  - Migrated a spreadsheet module from iframe to standalone React app with reverse-proxy routing; reduced load time by about 50%.
- Snaptrude: SDE Intern (Apr 2025 - Jul 2025)
  - Upgraded Stories Panel for real-time edits and feedback; improved experience for 50k+ users.
  - Built a feature to copy room layouts across multiple spaces; sped up design work by about 30%.
- Playpower Labs: SDE (July 2024 - April 2025)
  - Designed and developed web-based math questions for 1,000+ students, combining prompt-engineered narratives with gamified, performance-optimized math challenges.
  - Built an underwater camera app using Jetpack Compose, Kotlin, MVVM, and coroutines, enabling advanced camera controls and reliable image capture under challenging conditions.
- Playpower Labs: SDE Intern (Jan 2024 - June 2024)
  - Replaced existing Looker reports by developing a new reporting system using AngularJS, Spring, PostgreSQL, and GraphQL, serving 1,000+ users with improved functionality and UX.
  - Developed a high-performance BFF layer with GraphQL, optimizing data responses and implementing Java Spring for robust backend performance; reduced SQL query response times by about 12%.
  - Engineered micro-frontends with AngularJS and RxJS, improving state management, modularity, and maintainability.
 - Aegle Pro: SDE Intern (Jul 2023 - Dec 2023)
  - Used Node.js as the primary backend to develop a Svelte dashboard that helps doctors efficiently assign treatments to patients.
  - Implemented pagination for search queries in the exercise module using PostgreSQL, improving responsiveness for large datasets.
  - Built custom Flutter components and integrated them with the Node.js backend.

Projects
- Published Links Buddy
  - Chrome extension to save and organize published links from Claude, GPT, Bolt.
  - Stack: React, TypeScript, IndexedDB
- Dropfile
  - SaaS for secure temporary video file sharing.
  - Stack: Go, BadgerDB, Nginx, React, FFmpeg
- SecureDApp Website
  - 10+ responsive pages and a dashboard from Figma designs.
  - Stack: React, Tailwind CSS
- Geth: Concurrency
  - Modified go-ethereum to support multiple database clients on a single database.
  - Stack: Go, MDBX, RPC, Ethereum

Achievements (selected)

- Best Beginner Hack at Ingenious Hackathon 2021
- Winner of Website Making Challenge 2.0
- A grade certified National Cadet Corps
